platform_notes: Running on Shopify (catalystpet.myshopify.com) with a custom theme called 'Catalyst' v1.2.11 (not from the Shopify Theme Store). The theme uses jQuery 1.10.0 (2013-era), Modernizr 2.7.1, and Handlebars -- all significantly outdated libraries that impact performance and security.

theme.name: Catalyst
theme.version_note: v1.2.11 -- custom-built theme with no Theme Store ID. Last modified: 'Walmart/store locator changes - 2/23/2026'
theme.feature_note: Uses jQuery 1.10.0 (2013), Modernizr 2.7.1, Hammer.js, Owl Carousel -- all legacy libraries. Font file (Futura-Normal.ttf) is corrupted with cmap parsing errors. A JavaScript file (bio-bag-validation.js) returns 404. The theme lacks modern Shopify 2.0 section architecture.

checkout.guest_note: Standard Shopify checkout with guest checkout likely enabled
checkout.express_note: Express payments mentioned ('Express Payments are available at Checkout') but icons not displayed in cart drawer. Shop Pay, Apple Pay, and Google Pay detected in page source via shopify-digital-wallet meta tag.
checkout.friction_note: Cart uses a slide-out drawer (good UX pattern) with cross-sell recommendations. No Afterpay/BNPL messaging visible in cart despite Afterpay being detected in page source.

payments.methods_note: Shopify Payments as primary gateway with express checkout (Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay). Afterpay detected in source code for BNPL option.
payments.cod_note: N/A -- US market, no COD expected
payments.bnpl_note: Afterpay available but not prominently displayed. Consider adding BNPL messaging on PDP and cart ('4 payments of $X with Afterpay') to reduce price sensitivity for larger subscription orders.

cdn.image_note: Images served via Shopify CDN with automatic WebP conversion. However, several product images are large (900x900 originals) and some decorative images lack width/height attributes causing layout shifts.
cdn.compression_note: Shopify CDN handles compression automatically. The corrupted Futura-Normal.ttf font file adds unnecessary network requests with repeated download failures.
cdn.caching_note: Standard Shopify CDN caching in place. Third-party scripts (Klaviyo, Yotpo, Clarity, Triple Whale, TikTok, Facebook) add significant external requests.

security.https_note: Full HTTPS enabled across all pages via Shopify's automatic SSL certificate
security.pci_note: PCI DSS compliant via Shopify Payments. Checkout runs on Shopify's secure infrastructure.
security.cookie_note: Standard Shopify cookie implementation. Multiple tracking scripts (GA4, FB Pixel, TikTok, Klaviyo, Clarity, Triple Whale) set cookies -- privacy policy page exists but no cookie consent banner was observed.

health.summary: 4 of 6 infrastructure areas healthy. Theme architecture and CDN optimization need attention.

console_errors: Corrupted font file: Futura-Normal.ttf fails to decode (cmap parsing error) -- loads and fails 8+ times per page
404 error: A resource failed to load (server returned 404)
MIME type error: bio-bag-validation.js blocked -- returns text/html instead of JavaScript
Uncaught TypeError: 'Failed to construct URL: Invalid URL' -- JavaScript error on page load
narrative: Catalyst Pet runs on Shopify with a custom-built theme ('Catalyst' v1.2.11) that shows signs of technical debt. The theme relies on jQuery 1.10.0 and other legacy libraries from 2013, which impacts page performance. A corrupted font file (Futura-Normal.ttf) generates 8+ console warnings per page load, and a missing JavaScript file (bio-bag-validation.js) causes additional errors. The checkout infrastructure is solid with Shopify Payments, express checkout options, and Afterpay BNPL -- but these payment options are not prominently surfaced in the shopping experience. The most critical opportunity is modernizing the theme to Shopify 2.0 architecture, which would unlock section-based customization, improve Core Web Vitals, and eliminate the legacy library dependencies.
